hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

secure.title: Secure & Protected
secure.description: Your data is encrypted and stored securely

transparent.title: Fully Transparent
transparent.description: Clear information about what we collect and why

rights.title: Your Rights Matter
rights.description: You maintain control over your personal data

information.title: Information We Collect
information.intro: We collect information to provide better services to our clients. The types of information we collect include:

personal.title: Personal Information You Provide
personal.item1: Name, email address, phone number when you fill out contact forms
personal.item2: Event details, preferences, and special requirements
personal.item4: Photos and media during photography sessions

automatic.title: Automatically Collected Information
automatic.item1: Device information, browser type, and IP address
automatic.item2: Pages visited and time spent on our website
automatic.item3: Geographic location based on IP address

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.intro: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
usage.item1: To communicate with you about your photography needs and bookings
usage.item2: To provide and deliver our photography services
usage.item3: To process payments and manage your accounts
usage.item4: To improve our website, services, and customer experience
usage.item5: To send promotional materials (only with your consent)

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences and understand how you use our website.
cookies.types: We use essential cookies for site functionality, analytical cookies to understand user behavior, and preference cookies to remember your settings (like dark mode or language preference).
cookies.control: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences, though  disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality.

thirdparty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdparty.intro: We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in:
thirdparty.note: These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the specific purposes we've authorized.

security.title: Data Security
security.intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
security.measures: This includes SSL encryption for data transmission, secure server storage, regular security audits, and restricted access to personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights
rights.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.item1: Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you
rights.item2: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information
rights.item3: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data (subject to legal requirements)
rights.item4: Opt-out: Unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time
rights.item5: Portability: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format

contact.title: Contact Us About Privacy
contact.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal information, please contact us:

cta.title: Questions About Your Privacy?
cta.description: We're here to help. Contact us if you have any concerns about how we handle your data.
